summary: The ad targets individuals aspiring to work in motorsports by highlighting top universities in the UK and US that offer relevant degrees in engineering, sports management, and marketing. It features the Duolingo mascot at a Red Bull event to create a fun, engaging atmosphere. The final call to action promotes the Duolingo English Test as a gateway to over 6,000 institutions offering these programs.
